name: Employee Contribution Overview
description: High-level KPI dashboard showing contribution scores, project counts, and asset counts by department and employee tier.

name: Project Portfolio Dashboard
description: Active vs. completed projects, team sizes, skill coverage, and timeline tracking across all departments.

name: Top Contributor Leaderboard
description: Ranked list and bar chart of top 20 contributors by score, project participation, and digital asset creation.

name: Department Skill Coverage Map
description: Heatmap of skills across departments, identifying capability gaps and areas of expertise concentration.

name: Digital Asset Analytics
description: Volume, types, and source system distribution of digital assets per employee. Tracks presentation, document, spreadsheet, and email contributions.

name: HR Talent & Attrition Risk
description: Talent risk scores, tenure vs. contribution analysis, and AI-predicted attrition indicators for HR leadership.

name: Geographic Contribution Heatmap
description: World map showing contribution scores and employee counts by office location (Fremont, Portland, Bengaluru, Austin, Hsinchu).

name: Ontology Knowledge Graph Report
description: Visual summary of the Fabric IQ ontology entity coverage — employees, skills, projects, and relationships mapped to knowledge graph nodes.
